content: No definitive source confirms whether SwiftUI .textSelection(.enabled) on a .lineLimit(n)-truncated Text exposes the full underlying string vs only the visibly-rendered truncated glyphs; general SwiftUI truncation guidance (fivestars.blog, swiftui-lab.com, fatbobman.com) covers detection/fixing truncation but not this selection-of-hidden-text edge case. Treat as unverified; prefer a disclosure/expand toggle (state-driven lineLimit swap) over relying on lineLimit+selection to reach hidden text.
